prompt: Change the baby bear to a panda
prompt_refined: Edit the provided source image (`image 1`), which depicts a Banff National Park poster with an adult bear and a baby bear in water. Replace the baby bear, located to the right of the adult bear and precisely highlighted by the bounding box in `image 2`, with a baby panda. The newly generated baby panda must maintain the existing stylized, flat color illustration art style of `image 1` to seamlessly integrate with the water and the overall poster design.
objects: Baby panda in water (to the right of the adult bear)
